title: NacgVuln: Negative-aware and Chunk-enhanced Generative Line-level Vulnerability Localization

creators.name: Huang, Shuai
creators.affiliation: School of Computer Science and Engineering, Sichuan University of Science & Engineering, Yibin 644000, China

description: Replication package for NacgVuln, a negative-aware and chunk-enhanced generative framework for line-level vulnerability localization.
